evals.prompt: Create a @Json DTO record UserDto with fields id, name, email for an HTTP API.
Create an enum OrderStatus with @Json for JSON serialization via toString() with custom values (pending, processing, shipped).
Create a sealed interface PaymentResult with @JsonDiscriminatorField("type") and two implementations: PaymentSuccess (SUCCESS) and PaymentError (ERROR) for polymorphic JSON.
Create a @Json DTO ApiRequest with @JsonField annotations to rename fields: userId -> user_id, firstName -> first_name.
Create a @Json DTO UserUpdateRequest with optional fields via @Nullable (name, email) and a required field id.
Create a @Json DTO InternalDto with @JsonSkip to ignore the internal field internalField during serialization.
Create a @Json DTO Response with @JsonInclude(IncludeType.NON_NULL) to exclude null fields from JSON.
Create a @JsonReader DTO ImportData for deserialization of incoming data only.
Create a @JsonWriter DTO ExportData for serialization of outgoing data only.
Create a @Module with custom JsonReader<LocalDate> and JsonWriter<ZoneOffset> factory methods.
Create a @HttpController UserController with @Json methods for createUser (@Json UserRequest) and getUser (@Path String id) with JSON request/response.
Set up Jackson integration: add the jackson-module dependency, create a @KoraApp interface extending JacksonModule to use ObjectMapper instead of the built-in JSON module.
